TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sudadatan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 573 buwan, 1,495 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 296 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 1,199 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 10%, Amis 8%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sudadatan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga Pibutingan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕu*a*atan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa piβutiŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sudadatan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 573 buwan, 1,495 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 296 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 1,199 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 10%, Amis 8%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sudadatan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Sudadatan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Sudadatan hya' ga Pibutingan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕu*a*atan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕu*a*atan ħjaʔ ɣa piβutiŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
